remember: Students will be able to recall and identify key elements of the novel such as characters, plot, setting, and themes.
Students will be able to identify and explain the author's purpose and tone in the novel.
Students will be able to summarize the main events and plot points of the novel.
understand: Students will be able to analyze the character development of the protagonist and understand their motivations and conflicts.
Students will be able to explain how the author uses literary devices such as imagery, symbolism, and foreshadowing to convey themes and ideas.
Students will be able to understand the social and cultural context in which the novel was written and how it reflects the author's perspective.
apply: Students will be able to apply literary analysis techniques to the novel, such as identifying and analyzing themes, motifs, and character relationships.
Students will be able to use textual evidence to support their analysis and interpretation of the novel.
Students will be able to make connections between the novel and broader social and cultural issues.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the author's use of language and literary devices to create a specific tone and mood in the novel.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of the author's use of plot structure and character development to convey themes and ideas.
Students will be able to critique the novel's representation of social and cultural issues and evaluate its relevance to contemporary society.

ncert_objectives: To understand the novel as a work of literature and appreciate its aesthetic value.
To analyze the novel's themes, characters, and plot structure and understand their significance.
To evaluate the novel's representation of social and cultural issues and its relevance to contemporary society.
board_exam_objectives: To answer questions on the novel's plot, characters, themes, and literary devices.
To analyze and interpret the novel's themes and ideas using textual evidence.
To evaluate the novel's representation of social and cultural issues and its relevance to contemporary society.
